title: crepis jacquinii subsp. jacquinii
intro: Crepis jacquinii subsp. jacquinii, also known as the mountain hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Crepis jacquinii subsp. jacquinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Crepis jacquinii subsp. jacquinii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
